### How we can help
#### Discovery workshops
Get face-to-face training from our team of experts.
![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6075b7eba233511cc5d0dbc1/623d6cc09094094163cae351_checkmark.svg)
Get technical and business professionals up to speed on quantum computing.
![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6075b7eba233511cc5d0dbc1/623d6cc09094094163cae351_checkmark.svg)
Identify specific use-cases in your business where quantum computing will have impact.
![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6075b7eba233511cc5d0dbc1/623d6cc09094094163cae351_checkmark.svg)
Define your own quantum computing strategy.
[Contact us ![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6075b7eba233511cc5d0dbc1/622fa61d651a6e3df34f6d6b_arrow-right.svg)](https://www.qcware.com/book-meeting)
![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6075b7eba233511cc5d0dbc1/623d7038c1e39f51558244d9_workshops-illustration.svg)
#### Pilot Projects & R&D Projects
Work hands-on with our team to implement a quantum computing solution to a specific use-case.[  
](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6075b7eba2335141fad0dbcd/617723bad2571a73a2bd6c81_Projects-2019-12-30.pdf)
![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6075b7eba233511cc5d0dbc1/623d6cc09094094163cae351_checkmark.svg)
Prepare your team to take advantage of quantum computing.
![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6075b7eba233511cc5d0dbc1/623d6cc09094094163cae351_checkmark.svg)
Understand when your use-case will benefit from quantum computing.
![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6075b7eba233511cc5d0dbc1/623d6cc09094094163cae351_checkmark.svg)
Explore how different quantum algorithms and hardware work for your use-case.
[Contact us ![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6075b7eba233511cc5d0dbc1/622fa61d651a6e3df34f6d6b_arrow-right.svg)](https://www.qcware.com/book-meeting)
![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6075b7eba233511cc5d0dbc1/623dc436ca658520a10c0320_Group%20136.svg)
#### Research Projects
Break new ground in quantum computing alongside our team.[  
](https://forge.qcware.com/)
![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6075b7eba233511cc5d0dbc1/623d6cc09094094163cae351_checkmark.svg)
Collaborate with leaders in the field of quantum chemistry, optimization, and machine learning.
![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6075b7eba233511cc5d0dbc1/623d6cc09094094163cae351_checkmark.svg)
Jointly pursue new advancements in quantum computing.
![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6075b7eba233511cc5d0dbc1/623d6cc09094094163cae351_checkmark.svg)
Publish novel research and build intellectual property.
[Contact us ![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6075b7eba233511cc5d0dbc1/622fa61d651a6e3df34f6d6b_arrow-right.svg)](https://www.qcware.com/book-meeting)[![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6075b7eba233511cc5d0dbc1/623025ab510daaf32c21954e_arrow-right-black.svg)Go to Forge](https://www.qcware.com/solutions)
![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6075b7eba233511cc5d0dbc1/623dc4ac8951b43f2359552d_Group%20137.svg)
#### Research Project
Jointly pursue innovations that bring quantum computing closer to fruition.[  
](https://forge.qcware.com/)
![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6075b7eba233511cc5d0dbc1/623d6cc09094094163cae351_checkmark.svg)
Co-design new quantum algorithms that take advantage of your specific problem structure.
![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6075b7eba233511cc5d0dbc1/623d6cc09094094163cae351_checkmark.svg)
Explore opportunities to publish novel research.
![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6075b7eba233511cc5d0dbc1/623d6cc09094094163cae351_checkmark.svg)
Discover new IP.
[Contact us ![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6075b7eba233511cc5d0dbc1/622fa61d651a6e3df34f6d6b_arrow-right.svg)](https://www.qcware.com/book-meeting)
![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6075b7eba233511cc5d0dbc1/623dc4ac8951b43f2359552d_Group%20137.svg)
![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6075b7eba233511cc5d0dbc1/6230a3b7a2f2ebc1e14b80d5_cta-illustration.svg)
#### Ready to get started?
Book a consultation with us and let us help you take the next steps towards a Quantum future.
[Contact us ![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6075b7eba233511cc5d0dbc1/622fa61d651a6e3df34f6d6b_arrow-right.svg)](https://www.qcware.com/contact)
### Frequently asked
How can my organization get started with Quantum Computing?
![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6075b7eba233511cc5d0dbc1/625835923e95490bee942a70_dropdown-arrow.svg)
For organizations who have a demonstrated internal interest in quantum computing, we hold custom brainstorming workshops to plan your next steps and aid in hiring. If we see a clear path to a pilot project, we'll help put together a proposal to start scoping out a particular use-case.
Can we start a research collaboration?
![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6075b7eba233511cc5d0dbc1/625835923e95490bee942a70_dropdown-arrow.svg)
For organizations who have a demonstrated internal interest in quantum computing, we hold custom brainstorming workshops to plan your next steps and aid in hiring. If we see a clear path to a pilot project, we'll help put together a proposal to start scoping out a particular use-case.
Can we start a research collaboration?
![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6075b7eba233511cc5d0dbc1/625835923e95490bee942a70_dropdown-arrow.svg)
[fill in, contact us]
Who owns the intellectual property created during a project?
![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6075b7eba233511cc5d0dbc1/625835923e95490bee942a70_dropdown-arrow.svg)
Intellectual property created during the project is usually shared between the two parties in accordance to the statement of work. Co-developed patents are often shared, and final solutions (trained models, etc.) are often owned by the customer.
What is the format of the workshops?
![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6075b7eba233511cc5d0dbc1/625835923e95490bee942a70_dropdown-arrow.svg)
Workshops can be held remotely or in-person. The typical in-person workshop is two days long, and the virtual workshops are four half-days. Workshops include custom lectures, whiteboard brainstorming sessions, and hands-on training. Depending on your needs, we can modify the schedule and content as needed.
What is the format of the pilot projects?
![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6075b7eba233511cc5d0dbc1/625835923e95490bee942a70_dropdown-arrow.svg)
Pilot projects can last anywhere from five months to a year, and involve close communication. We set up a shared code repository and have biweekly or weekly meetings. In the early months, meetings are often lectures on the state of the research/field. Later, they turn into progress updates and new findings. We'll make sure your team understands the impact at every step.
Can we see a return on investment now?
![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6075b7eba233511cc5d0dbc1/625835923e95490bee942a70_dropdown-arrow.svg)
QC Ware's solutions offer both a quantum improvement and a conventional improvement (see: [news article]). This means that our software not only solves a problem better classically, but is ready to take advantage of quantum computing when it surpasses classical computing for that use-case.
![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6075b7eba233511cc5d0dbc1/6075b7eba233516494d0dbee_qc-ware-logo-light-horizontal.avif)
